zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri IV de Sully於大約1283年出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Henri III de SULLY33歲，母親Marguerite de BEAUMIERS35歲。他和Jeanne de VENDOME至少有1個兒子和8個女兒。他去世於大約1335年在法國崔洛易-吉黑波旁_享年54歲，埋葬在法國崔洛易-吉黑波旁_。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri IV de Sully was born about 1283, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Henri III de SULLY, was 33 and his mother, Marguerite de BEAUMIERS, was 35. He had at least 1 son and 8 daughters with Jeanne de VENDOME. He died about 1335, in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri IV de Sully est né environ 1283, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Henri III de SULLY, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de BEAUMIERS, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 8 filles avec Jeanne de VENDOME. Il est décédé environ 1335, à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France.

Er starb um 1335 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich und wurde in Vendôme, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri IV de Sully è nato il circa 1283 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Henri III de SULLY, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite de BEAUMIERS, aveva 35 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Henri IV de Sully(이)가 대략 1283년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri III de SULLY(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite de BEAUMIERS(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Jeanne de VENDOME(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1335년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 븐드o에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 븐드o에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri IV de Sully родился около 1283 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri III de SULLY было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de BEAUMIERS, 35. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 8 дочерей от Jeanne de VENDOME. Он умер около 1335 г. в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности вендoм, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция.
